title: eriogonum angulosum
intro: Eriogonum angulosum, also known as Canyon Buckwheat, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Polygonaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Eriogonum angulosum include its ability to soothe skin conditions, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
